subcodes.first_line: O true descendant of His Holiness Khalíl! Thy letter was received and the conversations with that Jewish person became known [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سلیل حقیقی حضرت خلیل نامه تو رسید و مذاکرات با آنشخص کلیمی نیز معلوم گردید
subcodes.subjects: @humor; jokes, @power of faith; power of the spirit, @review of publications, @praise and encouragement, @health and healing; material and spiritual healing
